title: Paper & Pen vs Odoo
metaTitle: Paper & Pen vs Odoo · Simpler Free ERP Alternative · Paper & Pen
metaDescription: Compare Paper & Pen and Odoo on price, free plan, Arabic RTL, setup speed and GCC VAT. A simpler, free, Arabic-first ERP alternative to Odoo.
keywords: paper and pen vs odoo, odoo alternative, free odoo alternative, simple erp, arabic erp software, odoo pricing gcc
heroSubtitle: Odoo is a powerful, modular ERP that can do almost anything. Paper & Pen is the simpler, free, Arabic-first path: invoicing free forever, modules when you need them, live in minutes. An honest comparison.
heroBullets: Live in minutes, not an implementation

features.title: Live in minutes
features.desc: No partner, no implementation phase. Sign up, set your tax and currency, and send an invoice today.

features.title: Free core
features.desc: Sales and invoicing are free forever. Pay only for the modules you actually switch on.

features.title: Arabic-first
features.desc: Full right-to-left Arabic interface and documents, with five UI languages out of the box.

sections.title: Where Odoo is strong
sections.body: Odoo is genuinely powerful. With dozens of apps, deep customisation and a strong developer ecosystem, it can model very complex businesses, from manufacturing routings to e-commerce and field service. If you have the budget, an implementation partner and bespoke processes, Odoo can be shaped to fit almost anything.

sections.title: Simplicity, price and time-to-value
sections.body: Most businesses do not need an implementation project to send an invoice. Paper & Pen is free to start, Arabic-first, and ready in minutes with GCC 5% VAT, native OMR, AED and SAR, and Paymob payments preset. You add Inventory, HR or Manufacturing only when you grow into them, so you are never paying for complexity you do not use.
items: No implementation cost to get started
GCC VAT and Gulf currencies preset
Add modules only as you grow

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen a good Odoo alternative?
faqs.a: Yes, for small and medium businesses that want to start free, go live fast and work in Arabic. Odoo remains the stronger choice for highly complex, heavily customised operations with an implementation budget.

faqs.q: Is Paper & Pen cheaper than Odoo?
faqs.a: The starting point is free for unlimited invoicing, with no per-user fee and no implementation cost. You only pay for optional modules you switch on.

faqs.q: How long does setup take versus Odoo?
faqs.a: Minutes. You sign up, set your currency and tax, and send an invoice the same day, with no partner or implementation phase.

faqs.q: Does Paper & Pen have inventory and manufacturing like Odoo?
faqs.a: Yes, as optional modules. You can add Inventory, HR, Accounting and Manufacturing when you grow into them, rather than paying for everything up front.
Paper & Pen is Arabic-first with a full right-to-left interface and Arabic documents, where Odoo's Arabic support is partial and often depends on configuration.

ctaSub: Start free with Paper & Pen, send an invoice today, and add modules only when you need them.
